title: Cirrus: Use human-readable CI VM Images
body:
Image content hasn't changed much, the biggest thing here is the `$IMAGE_SUFFIX` value.  This new schema is also fully manageable by renovate.  Allowing a tag-push to c/automation_images to create image update PRs in all repos automatically.

Ref: https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/247

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: @mtrmac this one is ready but...I had to re-run [Skopeo Test](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5036636140994560) much more than I would like.  They all seem like quay or networking-related flakes though, so :man_shrugging: not sure there's much that we can do.
